ast-find.description: Find all definitions, calls, and imports of a symbol
ast-find.template: Use the ast-grep MCP tool to search the current working directory for all usages of: $ARGUMENTS. Run multiple patterns to capture: function/class definitions, call sites, and import statements. Group results by file and summarize the usage patterns.

c7-docs.description: Look up docs for a library using Context7
c7-docs.template: Use the context7 MCP tools to look up documentation for: $ARGUMENTS. First resolve the library ID with `resolve-library-id`, then query the docs with `query-docs`. Return a clear, concise summary with relevant code examples.

c7-how.description: Ask how to do something with a library via Context7
c7-how.template: Use the context7 MCP tools to find out how to: $ARGUMENTS. Identify the relevant library, resolve its ID with `resolve-library-id`, then query the docs with `query-docs` using the question as the query. Show practical code examples.

c7-api.description: Look up an API reference via Context7
c7-api.template: Use the context7 MCP tools to look up the API reference for $1 in the $2 library. Resolve the library ID with `resolve-library-id`, then query with `query-docs` focused on the API signature, parameters, return values, and usage examples.

mem-save.description: Save a decision, convention, or fact to project memory
mem-save.template:
Use the memory MCP tool to store the following in the knowledge graph for this project:

$ARGUMENTS

Create or update an entity for this project if one doesn't exist. Add the information as an observation on the relevant entity. Use clear, reusable language so it can be recalled in future sessions.

mem-recall.description: Recall what has been remembered about this project
mem-recall.template: Use the memory MCP tool to search the knowledge graph for everything stored about this project and its codebase. Retrieve all entities, relations, and observations. Summarize the key decisions, conventions, and context that have been saved.

mem-clear.description: Clear all memory stored for this project
mem-clear.template: Use the memory MCP tool to find and delete all entities and observations stored for this project. List what is being removed before deleting, and confirm when done.
